title: ProjectConfig
description: Per-project forge configuration. Lives at <project-root>/.forge/project.json. Declares the project's demo shape, quality gate, optional logging knobs, metrics, and sweep plug-ins. The authoritative validator is orchestrator/project-config.ts validateProjectConfig; this schema is the operator-facing reference.

demo.description: How the project surfaces a reviewer-visible demo. The project half of the demo contract (docs/forge-project-contract.md); the forge half is skills/demo/SKILL.md. Demo composition is via demo.shape — there is no per-project demo.skill field.

shape.description: browser = Vite/Playwright; harness = test harness with regex-scrapable output; cli-diff = before/after stdout; artifact = generated file/output; none = infra-only initiatives, DEMO.md rationale block.

command.description: Argv-style command the unifier runs to produce the demo. Required when shape != 'none'.

output.description: Output directory relative to worktree root. Default: demo/<initiative-id>/.

baseline.description: Git ref / branch the unifier diffs against for before/after captures. Default: main.

preview_command.description: Required when shape = 'browser'. The dev/preview server command (forge picks a free PORT).

quality_gate_cmd.description: Argv-style command the developer-loop + unifier run between iterations. Must exit 0 on a green tree. Must be fast and deterministic (see contract clause C1).

logging.description: Optional logging / heartbeat knobs. Tunes forge-side behaviour without changing forge source.

heartbeat_seconds.description: Cadence in seconds for the agent_heartbeat liveness pulse (default 15s). Tune if the project's SDK calls are unusually long-running.

metrics.description: Optional holistic metrics block. Required for any project that wants exploration-shape initiatives; omit otherwise.

command.description: Argv-style command emitting one or more scalar metrics on stdout.

baselines_dir.description: Directory holding locked baseline markdown files.

tolerance_pct.description: Allowable percentage drift before flagging regression.

sweep.description: Optional parameter-sweep plug-in points. Consumed by skills/project-sweep when the unifier runs in harness-runner mode for type: exploration manifests.

start_command.description: Argv-style command that brings the testbed up.

draw_function.description: Path (worktree-relative) to a module exporting a sample-draw function.

measurement_extractor.description: Path (worktree-relative) to a module that parses metrics.command output.
